symptoms.symptom_name: Profound polyuria and polydipsia over several days

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Hypercalcaemia impairs renal concentrating ability, producing polyuria and secondary polydipsia.
Osmotic diuresis from hyperglycaemia is a classic cause of the same picture — must be excluded.
Polyuria with water loss can drive or reflect a severe sodium derangement.
Altered mentation marks severe hypercalcaemia and impending hypercalcaemic coma — an emergency.
Altered consciousness is non-specific; global rather than focal here argues against stroke.
Hypercalcaemia depresses neuromuscular excitability, producing flaccid weakness and hyporeflexia.
Potassium derangements are a leading cause of acute flaccid paralysis with arrhythmia risk.
Hypercalcaemia causes nausea, vomiting and gastrointestinal atony; also worsens the dehydration cycle.

symptoms.symptom_name: Constipation for four days with abdominal distension (paralytic ileus)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Smooth-muscle atony from hypercalcaemia causes constipation and paralytic ileus; also mandates nil-by-mouth.
Hypercalcaemia shortens the QT interval and predisposes to arrhythmia; potassium derangement adds further arrhythmia risk.

symptoms.symptom_name: Regular thiazide diuretic plus OTC calcium supplement use

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Thiazides reduce renal calcium excretion and cause volume depletion; added calcium supplementation is a classic potentiating cause of hypercalcaemia (a calcium-alkali picture).
Marked volume depletion is both a consequence and a driver of the hypercalcaemic cycle; visible dry lips are patient/carer-observable.

symptoms.symptom_name: Hypotension with tachycardia and occasional irregular beats

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective clinician measurement (BP 90/55, HR 115, irregular beats) — sealed; the AI Doctor infers circulatory instability from carer-reported drowsiness/weakness and palpitations, not a measured value.

symptoms.symptom_name: Global confusion, power 2/5 weakness and diminished deep tendon reflexes on examination

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Formal neurological examination is clinician-only and cannot be performed via telehealth — sealed answer key.

symptoms.symptom_name: Elevated serum calcium (and full electrolyte panel)

investigation_details.investigation_name: Serum calcium / corrected calcium and electrolyte panel
investigation_details.expected_result: Markedly elevated calcium (severe hypercalcaemia); confirms the offending cation
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: The specific derangement and its severity remain unknown; definitive treatment cannot be targeted.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Hospital laboratory confirmation — never available in real time via telehealth.
ECG changes support severe hypercalcaemia and quantify arrhythmia risk — clinician equipment, sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Normal or non-focal picture excluding acute stroke

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Symmetrical global flaccid weakness with a days-long metabolic prodrome argues against a focal vascular event.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Serum electrolytes including calcium, sodium, potassium, magnesium and phosphate
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Identifies and quantifies the offending cation; the pivotal emergency investigation — performed on hospital arrival.
Excludes a hyperglycaemic crisis (DKA/HHS) as the cause of the polyuria and altered mentation.
Detects electrolyte-related arrhythmia and QT changes; the patient is at risk of a fatal arrhythmia.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Renal function, venous blood gas and full blood count
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Assesses renal impairment, acid-base status and severity of the derangement to guide hospital treatment.
Not a first-line remote or telehealth action; imaging for stroke is a hospital decision after the metabolic emergency is addressed — the AI Doctor should not fixate on stroke work-up.
